note: A profile is ONE selection that fills every contract row at once. The kernel resolves the active profile at session start and loads its rows. Selection: read .madewell/profile (a local, gitignored one-line file naming the active profile); else madewell.json 'profile'; else resolve by first contact — a human with no profile set → guide; a headless/CI/agent run → naked; a technical maintainer in a dev-pack project → lead; a fresh guest clone of a dev-pack project → contributor (and run its onboarding). The quality row is 'organ-if-present-else-default': use the installed quality organ (Rumen) if present, else the batteries-included Enforcer.

lead.for: the owner who holds the project — a solo maintainer + their agent, as peers
lead.memory: default (flat files: STATE / DECISIONS / PRODUCT / status.jsonl)

contributor.for: a technical guest folded into an existing project — a contractor / new hire + their agent
contributor.authority: surfaces findings to the Lead; stays in lane

guide.for: a non-technical builder making their own thing from scratch
guide.authority: owner — every decision is theirs; the system holds the process

naked.for: machines, CI, headless agents — no human present
